'''rahuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enactin|enactin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-h-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enactin|enactin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| rahuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræhizith|ræhizith]] || [[word:ræhizij|ræhizij]] || [[word:ræhizish|ræhizish]] || [[word:ræhizi|ræhizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rahuhuzuth|rahuhuzuth]] || [[word:rahuhuzuj|rahuhuzuj]] || [[word:rahuhuzush|rahuhuzush]] || [[word:rahuhuzu|rahuhuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rahuzuth|rahuzuth]] || [[word:rahuzuj|rahuzuj]] || [[word:rahuzush|rahuzush]] || [[word:rahuzu|rahuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rahufzuth|rahufzuth]] || [[word:rahufzuj|rahufzuj]] || [[word:rahufzush|rahufzush]] || [[word:rahufzuf|rahufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rahuzuthu|rahuzuthu]] || [[word:rahuzuju|rahuzuju]] || [[word:rahuzushu|rahuzushu]] || [[word:rahuzuku|rahuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rahuzuth|rahuzuth]] || [[word:rahuzuj|rahuzuj]] || [[word:rahuzush|rahuzush]] || [[word:rahuzu|rahuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rahuzuthul|rahuzuthul]] || [[word:rahuzujul|rahuzujul]] || [[word:rahuzushul|rahuzushul]] || [[word:rahuzukul|rahuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rahuzuthuthu|rahuzuthuthu]] || [[word:rahuzujuju|rahuzujuju]] || [[word:rahuzushushu|rahuzushushu]] || [[word:rahuzuku|rahuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rahuzuthun|rahuzuthun]] || [[word:rahuzujun|rahuzujun]] || [[word:rahuzushun|rahuzushun]] || [[word:rahuzukun|rahuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rahuzuthuoro|rahuzuthuoro]] || [[word:rahuzujuoro|rahuzujuoro]] || [[word:rahuzushuoro|rahuzushuoro]] || [[word:rahuzukuoro|rahuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
